shellCommands.command:
/bin/bash -lc "mempal search \"react-hook-form flatten Date nested form values\" --json --top-k 5
sed -n '1,240p' AGENTS.md
sed -n '1,240p' src/utils/flatten.ts
sed -n '1,260p' src/__tests__/utils/flatten.test.ts
rg -n \"flatten\\(\" src | head -80"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,160p' src/utils/isObject.ts
rg -n \"instanceof Date|Date\\)|Date\" src/utils src/__tests__/utils | head -100
git status --short
cat package.json | sed -n '1,180p'"

/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff -- src/utils/flatten.ts src/__tests__/utils/flatten.test.ts
node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --pretty false'

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --check src/utils/flatten.ts src/__tests__/utils/flatten.test.ts && node_modules/.bin/jest --config ./scripts/jest/jest.config.js src/__tests__/utils/flatten.test.ts --runInBand && git diff --check'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
